children.heading: Delegation of functions to other Federal agencies
children.label: a Delegation of functions to other Federal agencies

children.text: delegate to the heads of other Federal agencies such functions, powers, and duties of the Secretary under this chapter as the Secretary determines to be appropriate; and
authorize the redelegation of the functions, powers, and duties by the heads of the agencies.

children.heading: Transfer of funds to other Federal agencies
children.label: b Transfer of funds to other Federal agencies
children.text: Funds authorized to be appropriated to carry out this chapter may be transferred between Federal agencies, if the funds are used for the purposes for which the funds are specifically authorized and appropriated.

children.heading: Transfer of funds from other Federal agencies
children.label: c Transfer of funds from other Federal agencies

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to paragraph (2), for the purposes of this chapter, the Secretary may accept transfers of funds from other Federal agencies if the funds are used for the purposes for which (and in accordance with the terms under which) the funds are specifically authorized and appropriated.

children.label: A
children.text: shall remain available until expended; and

children.label: B
children.text: may, to the extent necessary to carry out this chapter, be transferred to and merged by the Secretary with the appropriations for salaries and expenses.
